item.dc:creator: TheDiscoVampire

item.title: I live the good life.
item.description: I'm 47 years old and so happy. I work to make my community a better place and am able to explore and nurture my personal interests. I admire and appreciate the dedicated and caring souls with children who are able to raise them to be thoughtful, kind people. Thank you for being awesome parents. I rebelled against family pressure in my 20s and 30s to "carry on the family name" to focus on school and doctoring, throwing all my scraps of nurturing into a professional calling. As an introvert requiring extensive 'alone time' for psycho-emotional balance, if I had tried to do both, I would have made either terrible mother and mediocre physician or a middling mother and terrible physician and both would have sacrificed my own passions. Not everyone should be a parent. I am now past the age of societal and familial pressure to procreate and life is beautiful.
item.dc:creator: resolvingtolovelife

item.title: Happy Star Wars Day!
item.dc:creator: FrizBFerret

item.title: Literally
item.dc:creator: Ultraruben

item.title: Just Carrie Fisher.
item.description:
The best thing Star Wars ever gave me was an introduction to Carrie Fisher.
Strong and confident.
Such a funny and elating human being.
Honestly, she's just a delight.
Hope you are all going okay. Stay classy and don't forget to be kind to yourselves. May the force be with you.
item.dc:creator: GizmosBabySitter

item.title: 4th of may is a memorial day of war victims and those we lost in the Netherlands.
item.description: I know this is an American site and there's no way they could keep up with all memorials or celebrations etc around the world. I really don't expect them to and don't think I'm entitled to anything. But this one always catches me by surprise. Especially with the choice of words for the event for this year. Awkward... FP update... AGAIN! I don't expect that Imgur keeps track of these things, or changes it. It was just a weird moment, realizing it is memorial day and then opening the app to see I'm on the dark side of the force. I'm familiar with the event and it's concept. Thanks for your respect though. I'm glad I got to share some of our culture with you Muricans. For those confused... The Netherlands is in Europe. I'm Dutch. For those interested in the memorial day. It's officially called remembrance of the dead. We mostly remember fallen soldiers of WW1/2, those that fought and still continue to fight for our freedom, but also personal losses Sauce > https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Remembrance_of_the_Dead
item.dc:creator: owlcatsanctuary101

item.title: I barely tried, I don't care about the crop, and I did it on purpose to infuriate you.

item.title: May the 4th Be With You - Sitg Cosplay
item.description: Thank goodness I was tossed on team dark side today... Seems very fitting with this cosplay I put together specifically for today :D Hope you all have a great star wars day! Side note, I finally started up a youtube channel. Long way from getting all my new content up there, but feel free to sub there for future long form DJ mixes and eventually vids!: https://www.youtube.com/@AlsoAshleyB
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Bop
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Body painted myself as Darth Talon - mcroft07
item.description: Hi it's me! Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. Please don’t do that weird thing star wars fans do where they criticize and complain about everything star wars under a star wars post I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here I just learned the Halo theme on the piano (slowly). I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Having fun is a good thing, lest we forget...
item.description: May 4, 1970. Kent State University. Ohio National Guatd troops fired upon unarmed peaceful protesters, resulting in the deats of the above four US citizens. With all that is going on in America, please remember that the US government have not hesitated to fire upon their own.
item.dc:creator: pinpuller2365

item.title: Why do I have to be on the light side?!
item.description:
The prequels taught me that the Jedi counsel were a bunch of insufferable dumbasses. Yoda was kinda cool. Otherwise, dumbasses. Plus,
Darth Maul was my favorite character. I don't know why... he looked neat. Anyway, May the 4th be with you, let's do this!
